{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Celestial Lion-Horse
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Celestial Lion-Horse]] is a sacred beast whose mane threads are used in [[Eithan]]'s robe.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
